title: Bai Fan
content:
Bai Fan
 was the Celestial Emperor and ruler of the 
Thunder Celestial Realm
 before it collapsed.

Contents

1

Background

2

Celestial Spells

2.1

First Half

2.2

Second Half

Background
[
]

He was a member of the 
Immortal Astral Continent
's Dark Moon Sect before he was brought to the Ancient Celestial Realm by the previous Lord of the Sealed Realm.

Before his death, he seemed to have figured out that 
Seven-Colored Daoist
 had been interfering with Qing Shui's life to grow the Slaughter Essence inside him. Thus, he died while laughing at the heavens or, more accurately, at the silhouette of Seven-Colored Daoist.
